scripts.dev: CLASH_ALLOW_GUESTS=1 CLASH_ALLOW_DEBUG_GRANTS=1 CLASH_ALLOW_WORLD_RESEED=1 CLASH_INFINITE_RESOURCES=1 CLASH_UPGRADE_DURATION_MS=1000 vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173 --strictPort
scripts.dev:game: CLASH_ALLOW_GUESTS=1 CLASH_ALLOW_DEBUG_GRANTS=1 CLASH_ALLOW_WORLD_RESEED=1 CLASH_INFINITE_RESOURCES=1 CLASH_UPGRADE_DURATION_MS=1000 vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173 --strictPort --open /game
scripts.build: tsc -b && vite build && npm run build:server
scripts.build:vercel: npm run build && npm run build:vercel-api
scripts.test:admin: esbuild server/admin-auth.spec.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=dist-server/admin-auth-test.mjs && esbuild server/admin-http.spec.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=dist-server/admin-http-test.mjs && esbuild server/admin-legacy.spec.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=dist-server/admin-legacy-test.mjs && node --test dist-server/admin-auth-test.mjs dist-server/admin-http-test.mjs dist-server/admin-legacy-test.mjs
scripts.test:persistence: tsc --noEmit -p server/persistence/tsconfig.json && esbuild server/persistence/self-test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=dist-server/persistence-test.mjs && node --test dist-server/persistence-test.mjs
scripts.test:runtime: esbuild server/runtime/runtime.spec.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=dist-server/runtime-test.mjs && esbuild server/runtime/attack-service.spec.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=dist-server/runtime-attack-test.mjs && esbuild server/runtime/admin.spec.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=dist-server/runtime-admin-test.mjs && node --test dist-server/runtime-test.mjs dist-server/runtime-attack-test.mjs dist-server/runtime-admin-test.mjs
scripts.test:world-domain: esbuild server/domain/world/world.spec.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist-server/world-domain-test.mjs && esbuild scripts/world-hydrology-regression.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist-server/world-hydrology-test.mjs && node dist-server/world-domain-test.mjs && node dist-server/world-hydrology-test.mjs
scripts.db:migrate: npm run build:persistence --silent && node dist-server/persistence.mjs migrate
scripts.db:migrate:release: npm run build:persistence --silent && node dist-server/persistence.mjs migrate-release
scripts.db:materialize-legacy: npm run build:persistence --silent && node dist-server/persistence.mjs materialize-legacy
scripts.db:validate-legacy: npm run build:persistence --silent && node dist-server/persistence.mjs validate-legacy
scripts.db:import-legacy: npm run build:persistence --silent && node dist-server/persistence.mjs import-legacy
scripts.db:verify-legacy: npm run build:persistence --silent && node dist-server/persistence.mjs verify-legacy
scripts.verify: npm run test:admin && npm run test:server && npm run test:persistence && npm run test:runtime && npm run test:world-domain && npm run test:procedural-village && npm run test:postgres && node scripts/run-attack-domain-regression.mjs && npm run test:defenses && npm run test:building-visuals && npm run test:client-attacks && npm run test:pathing && npm run test:world-postcards && npm run test:world-nature && npm run test:display-resolution && npm run test:render-quality && npm run build
